document_name: Nokia restrategising away from mobile devices

document_sentence_array.text: Nokia Corporation has historically been the global leader in mobile handset production for over a decade.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Secret board minutes from July 10th reveal that Stephen Elop has finalized a $7,200,000,000 sale price for the handset division to Microsoft.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Internal strategy decks from the 'Lumia' marketing team suggest that consumer interest in Windows Phone is below 5% in key markets.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: The telecommunications infrastructure market is expected to grow as 4G LTE deployment accelerates across Europe and Asia.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: A confidential $2,100,000,000 buyout offer for Siemens’ stake in the Nokia Siemens Networks (NSN) joint venture has been approved.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Public stock analysts have noted that Nokia's share price is currently trading at a multi-year low due to smartphone competition.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: The legal department is quietly preparing a massive patent licensing lawsuit against several Android manufacturers to generate cash flow.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: The Microsoft transaction includes a non-compete clause that prevents Nokia from entering the phone market for at least 30 months.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Many employees in the Espoo headquarters are reportedly worried about potential layoffs following the structural reorganization.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Nokia’s annual report for 2013 highlights the company’s commitment to its 'HERE' mapping and location services.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: An unannounced $1,500,000,000 restructuring charge is being reserved to facilitate the severance of 12,500 staff members globally.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: General industry trends indicate a shift toward software-defined networking and cloud-based infrastructure solutions.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Senior management is considering a total rebrand of the company to distance itself from the 'failing' consumer device image.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: We have identified a private memo suggesting that the CEO's $18,800,000 bonus is contingent on the Microsoft deal closing by Q1.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Microsoft's CEO, Steve Ballmer, has publicly expressed confidence in the integration of hardware and software ecosystems.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal financial audits show that the 'NSN' division is now the only profitable segment of the entire Nokia portfolio.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: The acquisition of the remaining 50% of the NSN venture will be funded via a $1,200,000,000 bridge loan from a Finnish syndicate.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Nokia Siemens Networks focuses on providing radio access network equipment to major carriers like AT&T and Verizon.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Compliance has flagged several large-volume put options placed by individuals with ties to the Nokia-Siemens integration team.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Standard regulatory filings show that the company holds one of the largest patent portfolios in the wireless industry.
document_sentence_array.label: Non
